name: self_modifier
description: Kernel component: self_modifier

name: gap_detector
description: Kernel component: gap_detector

name: capability_registry
description: Kernel component: capability_registry

name: model_interface
description: Kernel component: model_interface

name: generation_loop
description: Kernel component: generation_loop

name: alignment_gates
description: Kernel component: alignment_gates

name: user_communication
description: Implements robust user communication handling for sending messages, receiving input, and managing conversation state.

name: push_notification
description: Implements push notification sending via a service like Firebase Cloud Messaging for asynchronous user alerts.

name: discord_notifier
description: Implements sending asynchronous notifications to Jesse via Discord direct messages using DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and JESSE_DISCORD_ID.

name: event_loop
description: Implements a persistent asyncio event loop enabling Archi to run continuously, monitor for user messages from Jesse, detect gaps, and execute actions without exiting after each cycle.

name: api_introspection
description: Provides a mechanism to introspect available functions, signatures, and docstrings in registered capabilities and modules before generating dependent code.

name: discord_gateway
description: Establishes a persistent Discord gateway WebSocket connection using discord.py to receive MESSAGE_CREATE events for DMs from Jesse and routes them to Archi's user_communication for processing.

name: discord_listener
description: Establishes a persistent Discord WebSocket listener using discord_gateway to receive DMs from Jesse and processes them to trigger the generation loop or execute direct instructions.

name: self_evaluator
description: Provides a periodic self-reflection loop that analyzes interaction logs and operational history to proactively generate capability gaps and insights on improving service to Jesse.

name: image_analysis
description: Provides comprehensive image analysis for Discord attachments, including OCR text extraction, vision-based description, and detection/logging of capability gaps from screenshots of errors, conversations, or logs.

name: image_vision
description: Vision model integration to analyze and describe images from Discord messages using Claude-3.5-sonnet. Combines OCR and vision analysis to generate contextual responses for Jesse.

name: image_ocr
description: Dedicated capability for performing optical character recognition (OCR) on images from URLs to extract readable text.

name: conversational_memory
description: Implements persistent storage and retrieval of per-user conversation history to maintain context across sessions and messages.

name: image_recognition
description: Provides unified image recognition combining OCR text extraction and vision-based semantic interpretation for processing screenshots and conversation images from Discord.

name: timestamped_chat_history_recall
description: Retrieves specific past messages from a user's conversation history by matching exact timestamps.

name: wire_timestamped_chat_history_recall
description: Wire timestamped_chat_history_recall into the Discord listener's message processing to enable users to recall specific past messages or ranges by timestamp via simple commands.

name: gap_logging_sync
description: Synchronizes gap detection logging between backend terminal outputs and frontend Discord notifications to ensure accurate gap reporting to users like Jesse.

name: wire_gap_logging_sync
description: Integrate gap_logging_sync into the event loop to enable periodic synchronization of detected gaps with Discord, making it reachable and active.
